narrative:
Precinct Fostoria 3-B (precinct in Seneca County) has 812 registered voters, with 73.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
